meta.title: Ditto Scan - Document Scanner and PDF App for Android

product.name: Ditto Scan
product.heroTitle: Ditto Scan - Scan Documents and Export PDFs on Android
product.heroDescription: Capture paper documents with your camera or import existing photos, then crop, deskew, enhance, organize, and export them as polished multi-page PDFs. Ditto Scan is built for fast everyday scanning on Android phones and tablets.

stats.label: Scan live pages or import document photos
Export complete documents with size and quality options
Responsive layouts for compact and larger screens

features.title: Everything You Need for Everyday Document Scanning

cards.title: Capture or Import Pages
bullets: Scan documents with the device camera
Import document photos from the gallery or photo picker
Use flash control while capturing pages
Turn the camera grid overlay on or off for better alignment

cards.title: Clean Up Each Page
bullets: Manually crop document corners with precise control
Deskew pages into a flatter scanned-document view
Rotate pages left or right before saving
Apply Natural, Enhanced Color, Grayscale, or Black and White filters

cards.title: Build Multi-Page Documents
bullets: Create document projects with one page or many pages
Add new pages to an existing project at any time
Replace an existing page without changing its position
Reorder pages with drag and drop or remove pages you no longer need

cards.title: Review Before You Export
bullets: Open a full page preview for every scanned page
Move between previous and next pages inside preview
Pinch to zoom, pan, and double tap to reset the preview
Edit the crop again from the preview screen when needed

cards.title: Flexible PDF Export
bullets: Export each project as a multi-page PDF
Choose A4, Letter, or Original image size for exported pages
Choose Low, Medium, or High export quality
Share exported PDFs directly with the Android share sheet

cards.title: Organized Project Library
bullets: Name, rename, open, search, and delete projects
Browse project thumbnails, page counts, and last updated info
Generate thumbnails for faster project and page browsing
Keep one current PDF export per project instead of piling up old copies

cards.title: Defaults That Save Time
bullets: Save a default image filter mode
Save a default PDF page size
Save a default PDF export quality
Preserve photo orientation from original image metadata when loading images

cards.title: Private Local Storage
bullets: Store projects, originals, processed pages, thumbnails, and exports in app-private local storage
No cloud account is required for normal use
Designed for quick personal scanning workflows on Android
Includes a free demo experience with subscription plans for expanded usage

items.title: Students and Study Notes
items.text: Scan class notes, handouts, assignments, and reference sheets into portable PDFs you can keep organized by project.

items.title: Work and Office Paperwork
items.text: Capture invoices, reports, signed forms, meeting notes, and printed documents from your phone or tablet when you need a quick digital copy.

items.title: Receipts and Expense Records
items.text: Turn receipts, bills, and warranty papers into readable scans, then export and share them as PDFs for bookkeeping or reimbursement.

items.title: Home Document Backup
items.text: Digitize IDs, utility papers, application forms, appliance documents, and other everyday paperwork without needing a desktop scanner.

items.q: What is Ditto Scan?
items.a: Ditto Scan is an Android document scanner app that helps you capture or import pages, clean them up, organize them into projects, and export them as PDFs.

items.q: Can I scan documents with the camera?
items.a: Yes. Ditto Scan supports live document capture with the device camera, including flash control and an optional grid overlay for alignment.

items.q: Can I import existing document photos?
items.a: Yes. You can bring in document images from the gallery or Android photo picker and continue editing them inside the app.

items.q: Can I crop and straighten scanned pages?
items.a: Yes. You can manually adjust document corners, deskew pages into a flatter view, and rotate pages before saving.

items.q: What filters does Ditto Scan support?
items.a: Ditto Scan includes Natural, Enhanced Color, Grayscale, and Black and White filter modes for scanned pages.

items.q: Can I create multi-page PDFs?
items.a: Yes. Each project can contain multiple pages and can be exported as a multi-page PDF.

items.q: Can I reorder or replace pages in a project?
items.a: Yes. You can reorder pages with drag and drop, replace a page without changing its position, add new pages, or delete individual pages.

items.q: Can I preview and zoom pages before exporting?
items.a: Yes. The page preview supports previous and next navigation, pinch to zoom, pan, double tap reset, and quick crop editing.

items.q: What PDF export options are available?
items.a: You can export using A4, Letter, or Original image size and choose Low, Medium, or High PDF quality before sharing.

items.q: Does Ditto Scan store documents locally?
items.a: Yes. Projects, original photos, processed pages, thumbnails, and exports are stored in app-private local storage on the device.

steps.title: Export and Share

items.q: What is Ditto Scan?
items.a: Ditto Scan is an Android document scanner app that lets you capture or import pages, edit them, organize them into projects, and export PDFs.

items.q: Can I scan paper documents with my phone camera?
items.a: Yes. Ditto Scan supports camera-based document capture with flash control and an optional grid overlay.

items.q: Can I import images from the gallery?
items.a: Yes. You can import existing document photos from the gallery or Android photo picker.

items.q: Can I crop, deskew, and rotate pages?
items.a: Yes. Ditto Scan lets you manually crop page corners, deskew the document view, and rotate pages before saving.

items.q: Can I create a document with multiple pages?
items.a: Yes. Ditto Scan supports multi-page document projects and PDF export.

items.q: Can I rearrange pages later?
items.a: Yes. You can reorder pages with drag and drop, add new pages, replace a page in place, or remove pages you no longer need.

items.q: Can I share a single page as an image?
items.a: Yes. A single page can be shared as a JPEG from the preview flow.

items.q: What PDF settings can I choose?
items.a: You can choose A4, Letter, or Original image size, plus Low, Medium, or High export quality.

items.q: Does Ditto Scan store files locally?
items.a: Yes. The app stores projects and related files in app-private local storage on your device.

items.q: Does Ditto Scan work on tablets too?
items.a: Yes. The app supports responsive layouts for phones and tablets, including flexible tablet-friendly screens.
